title: Property Consultant - Jayabheri Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Jayabheri Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jayabheri Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Jayabheri Group:
Jayabheri Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jayabheri Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
